events.name: Prosper Show 2026
events.description: A tactical seller-focused conference built around Amazon growth, marketplace operations, solution providers, and operator networking.

events.name: Shoptalk Spring 2026
events.description: One of the biggest retail and ecommerce gatherings of the year, bringing together brands, retailers, technology leaders, and investors.

events.name: Amazon New Seller Summit 2026
events.description: A focused one-day Amazon event for newer sellers covering listings, brand setup, fulfillment, and practical launch guidance from Amazon experts.

events.name: CommerceNext Growth Show 2026
events.description: A high-signal gathering for ecommerce, DTC, and retail growth leaders focused on acquisition, retention, lifecycle marketing, and commerce strategy.

events.name: Amazon Accelerate 2026
events.description: Amazon's annual seller conference featuring platform announcements, educational sessions, operator networking, and product roadmap visibility.

events.name: Groceryshop 2026
events.description: The marquee event for grocery, CPG, marketplaces, retail media, and the end-to-end commerce ecosystem around modern retail operations.

events.name: Shoptalk Fall 2026
events.description: Shoptalk's fall flagship for retail innovation, peer collaboration, and operator planning ahead of the next cycle of commerce change.

events.name: Walmart Open Call 2026
events.description: Walmart's annual pitch event for U.S.-made, grown, or assembled products, connecting founders directly with Walmart and Sam's Club merchants.
